creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Created attachment 232154
Patch against /usr/ports

I am an upstream maintainer of msktutil, we have released version 1.2 on last Friday.

Attached you'll find a patch. Following changes in the patch:

* Document move from sbin/ to bin/ in UPDATING
* Use ${PORTNAME} throughout
* Remove dependency on udns, there was a bug in the configure script which did not properly detect ns_initparse(): https://github.com/msktutil/msktutil/commit/8ed0df4399a3e441909285d6ebebbf5335479fe7
